diagrams.title: CAP Triangle
diagrams.description: A triangular diagram showing the three properties of CAP theorem with database placements
elements: CA at top-left edge (not achievable in practice)
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the trade-offs in CAP theorem and understand database classification

diagrams.title: Network Partition Scenario
diagrams.description: Diagram showing a distributed database with network failure between nodes
elements: Network partition line between Node 1 and others
Options: CP (reject requests) or AP (serve from available nodes)
diagrams.purpose: Understand what happens during network partition and the forced choice between consistency and availability

diagrams.title: CAP to PACELC Evolution
diagrams.description: Extended diagram showing PACELC theorem building on CAP
elements: A or C - CAP choice during partition
L or C - Latency vs Consistency when no partition
diagrams.purpose: Understand the additional trade-off between latency and consistency even without network partitions
